match.userMessage:
Camera executes a slow, steady dolly forward from medium eye-level framing toward the vanity surface. Scarlett's hand reaches deliberately into the white box and presses the coral tube against the marble, creating a sharp directional shadow that holds under natural light. Subtle finger adjustments catch and release highlights on the matte finish.

Voiceover delivery remains calm and reflective with minimal on-camera movement beyond the hand action.

Soft fabric folds shift lightly on the sleeve as the arm extends, with faint dust motes drifting in the window beam.

[SCARLETT, calm reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: quiet studio with faint distant waves. subtle finger contact with matte tube, light object placement on marble.
